tool_args.label: Staff Summary - Conveyance of Property Interests in Wakefield, Bronx for Transit-Oriented Development

payload.title: Conveyance of Property Interests in the Wakefield Section of the Bronx to Facilitate Adjacent Transit-Oriented Development
payload.publisher: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Finance Committee Meeting
payload.description: Staff Summary regarding conveyance of MTA property interests at Bullard Avenue and East 241st Street, Bronx to Webster Leasing LLC for transit-oriented development adjacent to MNR's Wakefield Station

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: A New York limited liability company, owned and controlled by Lawrence Blinn, PJ Mazzucca, Kevin Blinn and Greg Blinn
MTA Transit Oriented Development department under Department Head Robert Paley, engaged in property disposition for transit-oriented development

warnings: entity.office is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Office names are relation context unless the source treats the office as the entity.

payload.description: Agency that owns the MTA Property in Wakefield section of the Bronx and is party to the conveyance of property interests for transit-oriented development
MNR operates the Harlem and New Haven lines adjacent to the MTA Property, with Wakefield Station in immediate proximity, and has trackage/equipment critical to operations at the MTA Property

Ambitious 1,200-unit, all-affordable, multifamily housing project proposed by Webster Leasing on Development Parcels in the Wakefield section of the Bronx, adjacent to MNR's Wakefield Station, involving rezoning from industrial use
payload.location: Bullard Avenue and East 241st Street, The Bronx, New York

location_normalized.raw_text: Bullard Avenue and East 241st Street, The Bronx, New York

payload.description: Board action to authorize conditional designation of Webster Leasing as successful proposer under RFP, and negotiation/entry into LDDA
Finance Committee meeting to consider the conveyance of property interests
Total Purchase Price for the MTA Property Interests (Fee Parcels, Access Easement, Utility Easement) plus in-kind contributions
Purchase price for the Fee Parcels portion of the MTA Property Interests
Purchase price for the permanent non-exclusive access easement
Purchase price for the permanent subsurface utility easement
Webster Leasing's initial offer in response to the RFP for the MTA Property Interests
Payment due at closing on Phase 1 of the Project
Payment due at closing on Phase 2 of the Project
Payment due at closing on Phase 3 of the Project
Payment due at closing on Phase 4 of the Project
Approximate size of the Fee Parcels portion of the MTA Property

payload.claim_text: Webster Leasing is actively advancing an ambitious proposal to develop the Development Parcels as a 1,200-unit, all-affordable, multifamily housing project (the 'Project')
payload.description: The Project consists of a 1,200-unit all-affordable multifamily housing development on the Development Parcels in the Wakefield section of the Bronx
Proposed number of housing units in the all-affordable multifamily housing project

payload.claim_text: Webster Leasing has proposed to develop the Project in four phases as funding for the Project becomes available through allocations of affordable housing funds.
payload.description: The Project is to be developed in four phases: Phase 1 acquiring approximately 40% of the Fee Parcels area plus easements, with remaining Fee Parcels in three additional phases

tool_args.label: Access Drive Construction and Maintenance Obligation

payload.claim_text: Webster Leasing will construct and maintain for MTA/MNR's use a covered access drive (the 'Access Drive') through the completed Project within the MTA Access Easement area
payload.description: Webster Leasing is required to construct and maintain an access drive through the Project for unimpaired 24/7 vehicular access to MNR's trackage and yard

payload.claim_text: The LDDA will be subject to further Board action approving the transaction and authorizing the execution and delivery of the Transaction Documents following compliance by MTA and MNR with SEQRA as it relates to the sale or transfer of the MTA Property Interests and the acquisition of the MTA Access Easement, including the adoption of SEQRA findings by the MTA/MNR Board
payload.description: Transaction is conditioned upon compliance with the State Environmental Quality Review Act (SEQRA)

payload.claim_text: For Phase 1 of the Project, Webster Leasing has proposed to acquire approximately 40% of the area comprising the Fee Parcels, as well as the Access Easement and the Utility Easement needed for the Project
payload.description: Phase 1 involves acquiring approximately 40% of the Fee Parcels area
The Wakefield TOD Project was considered for board action on 12/18/2024 to authorize conditional designation and LDDA negotiation
The Finance Committee meeting on 12/16/2024 considered the conveyance of property interests for the project
Webster Leasing is the sole respondent to the RFP and the proposed developer of the Project
MTA owns the MTA Property in fee and is conveying property interests to facilitate the Project
MTA is the fee owner conveying the MTA Property Interests to facilitate the Project
MNR's Harlem and New Haven lines, trackage, equipment, and 24/7 access are at the MTA Property adjacent to the Project
MTA Transit Oriented Development (TOD) issued the RFP, negotiated with Webster Leasing, and is requesting board authorization

payload.description: Total Purchase Price for the MTA Property Interests
